bead.title: test: prove denied transaction atomicity and explain re-evaluation
bead.description:
Context: STP-103 and STP-104 retain P0 proof gaps: transactions with one denied operation must abort wholly with no mutation audit, denied idempotent replays must return the same forbidden response, and execution must re-evaluate enforcement even if a stale advisory explain exists. These are core guardrails for agent/human collaboration.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-server/tests/graphql_policy_contract.rs`, `crates/axon-api/` transaction/policy handling only if behavior is missing, and STP-103/STP-104 rows.
Out-of-scope: mutation-intent approval workflow and UI rendering.
Implementation hint: create a multi-operation transaction fixture where one step is denied; assert no partial state change and no mutation audit record for the aborted transaction.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_policy_contract` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-api` passes if API behavior changes.
3. The executable @covers scanner reports coverage for STP-103 AC3/AC4 and STP-104 AC4 if those rows are changed.
4. STP rows are updated only with cited passing evidence.
